creator: jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net
text:
jgnat-1.0p (the one in the jgnat port) was developed with gnat-3.12p.
	gnat-3.12p has a bug that will allow a Character to be cast directly
	to a Wide_Character.  This was fixed in gnat-3.13p, but as a result,
	jgnat-1.0p will no longer compile under gnat-3.13p.

Fix: The patch:
How-To-Repeat: 	Just try to make or make install jgnat . . .
